creator: dteske@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for reporting. I will have a look to see what has changed with respect to ICMP packets in a vnet jail. I bet some sysctl has to be twisted or something.

ASIDE: rc.conf based jails are not going anywhere, to my knowledge, as jail.conf based jails cannot be managed as easily (whereas rc.conf jails can easily be managed in a site using sysrc).
